_readme: Yelp prohibits automated scraping and its API only returns 3 short excerpts, so Yelp reviews are curated here by hand. Add entries below; the build picks them up automatically and dedupes by id. Keep id unique, e.g. yelp:001.

reviews.author: Replace Me
reviews.text: Replace this with a real Yelp review excerpt, then delete the sample flag.
